arts.ttl: Report: Premier League club named as favourites for Nico Williams
arts.sum: Arsenal are in a prime position to secure the signing of Athletic Club winger Nico Williams, with personal terms and wages reportedly not posing any obstacles for the Gunners. The Spanish international has attracted interest from several top European clubs, including Chelsea and Barcelona, but Arsenal’s current financial standing has put them ahead of the […] The post Report: Premier League club named as favourites for Nico Williams appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid had scouts at Spain vs Netherlands
arts.sum: La Liga champions Real Madrid sent a team of scouts to watch over Thursday’s meeting between Spain and The Netherlands. That’s according to Marca, who have confirmed that as much…
